feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PRs created from MRP can be mass released in ME55 manually
entry.content:
We faced an issue, A PR that is in Hand Over process can still be approved using ME55 transaction. If the same PR is adopted into a PO, it will trigger an error PR is in process. However, if the PO is hold, the PR cannot be removed from the PO because of the same error. 

  • Generate a PR from MRP that requires Hand Over
  • Approve the PR using ME55
  • Adopt the PR into a PO
  • Click Hold
  • Edit the Held PO, and try deleting the line item. Held PO cannot be saved due to the error.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Extend Validity of E-Waybill
entry.content:
How to extend the validity of E-Waybill?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GO Button(Fiori List Report). When Press GO button should Validate Selection fields
entry.content:
I have created report by using List Report (Fiori template) with CDS odata service.

Requirement: Without entering any input values on Selection Fields user Press GO button should give the error message like "Please do not run without selection fields input" and not display the data.

Basically I need to validate selection fields when press GO button

If anybody is done this same scenario kindly provide the details of code with place holders.

Thanks, 

Subba Reddy

entry.title: API to read data from Manage Workforce app
entry.content: I would like to know if there is API to read data from Manage Workforce app in S4HANA system.

entry.title: sap core data services
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all I don't know if it is correct to ask this question in this section so please tell me if I am wrong.
the reason of this post is to ask you about some learning path about sap core data services together with fiori elements applications.
I have found a lot of information but not for beginners in the subject, so I would appreciate if someone with more knowledge can tell me where it would be practical to learn.
thank you very much!

entry.title: Product Roadmap
entry.content: Specify policy on future upgrades and Future product release. Also explain your product lifecycle management of S/4HANA on Rise with product-technology roadmap for the next 10 years.

entry.title: Patches & Enhancement Info
entry.content: Do Rise with S/4HANA cloud - PCEprovides notification and patches of S/4HANA,  enhancements and fixes  after implementation on a proactive basis? Does Annual Charges cover this?

entry.title: Data Replication Framework (DRF) General Ledger
entry.content:
Hello at all,

I have configured the DRF to replicate General Ledger. I use the OutbImpl. 1010 (General Ledger Account Master).
For the SOAP-configuration I use the CO_USMD_GENLEDACCMRPLCTNRQ. If I made a ping test it works.
I am not sure what is the right combination for the OutbImpl. and for the SOAP-Service. 

If I try to use Transaction DRFOUT to send data, I got an exception.  

My real question is:
What is the OutbImp. and SOAP Service to replicate General Ledger. 
In the SAP Hep Side, there is no information about the API.

kind regards

Gunter

entry.title: Getting Timeout Error when adding a S4 HANA system in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have downloaded Eclipse for IDE fromEclipse.org. We have an existing S4 HANA system with below installed Product versions (screenshot below). When I try to add this SAP system into Eclipse under ABAP Perspective. It just timeout. Attached below is the Eclipse Trace log

LOCATION SAP-Gateway on host 
sapgw01
ERROR timeout during allocate
TIME Wed Nov 20 15:40:27 2024
RELEASE 789
COMPONENT SAP-Gateway
VERSION 2
RC 242
MODULE /bas/789_REL/src/krn/si/gw/gwr3cpic.c
LINE 2264
DETAIL no connect of TP sapdp01 from host 10.53.252.5 after 20 sec
COUNTER 2
(remote system is [<unknown>])
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbstractConnection.generateJCoException(AbstractConnection.java:623)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connectInternal(ClientConnection.java:626)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connect(ClientConnection.java:1202)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RepositoryConnection.connect(RepositoryConnection.java:190)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.PoolingFactory.init(PoolingFactory.java:116)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.createFactory(ConnectionManager.java:527)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultConnectionManager.createFactory(DefaultConnectionManager.java:31)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.getFactory(ConnectionManager.java:469)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RfcDestination.getSystemID(RfcDestination.java:1697)
... 35 more
Caused by: RfcException raised by system [<unknown>]:
message: Connect from SAP gateway to RFC server failed
connection parameters: TYPE=A DESTINATION=S4D_100_ecosys3_en ASHOST=10.53.252.5 SYSNR=01 PCS=1

SAP Experts can you please help. We need to add this system for developing CDS views
BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) ABAP Development  #Eclipse

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - GR Based IV indicator Check
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the intercompany stock transfer happens from US to UK or France and they don't need to have invoice for that.

Is it possible to create a 0 dollar purchase order in SAP S/4 public cloud. I tried by creating a NBIC PO with marking that line item free but it still throwing an error that GR and IR indicators are necessary. GR Based IV indicator is greyed out and I couldn't do any manual control over that. I checked in Vendor master and it's unticked on that and also there is no PIR maintained for that product. I believe it's a system default setting. Would someone can throw some lights on the above would be great.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Difference between Readiness Check and Sizing values
entry.content:
Hello!

A customer is going to migrate from:
ECC 6.0 to RISE S/4HANA Private Edition

We are evaluating how much additional memory we have to add to the target architecture.
The Sizing report indicates (Gib):
- Memory requirement 1,604.0
- Net data size on disk 1,490.2

The Readiness Check report indicates:
Anticipated Initial Memory Requirement for SAP HANA 524 (in GiB)

We have few questions about the Readiness Check and Sizing reports:

1) Which of the two data (Readiness Check or Sizing) do I take to calculate the memory required for the migration?

2) Where does it indicate in these reports the amount of memory required for the following SKUs:
FileSystem
File Storage
8008794 - Additional File Storage
8011367 - Additional Database Storage

3) Or how could I calculate FileSystem and FileStorage?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: what language does S/4 support?
entry.content:
Client wants to know
1) what language S/4 HANA supports
2) what language of user manuals SAP provides
3) the language support difference between Private and Public edition

where can I check them?

entry.title: FSP0/FS00 translation fields (SKAT) not changable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Since the update to SAP S/4HANA 2023, G/L account texts in transaction FS00 or FSP0 can no longer be changed in certain languages because the fields are not active despite change mode.
More precisely, this concerns
Program: SAPLGL_ACCOUNT_MASTER_MAINTAIN
Screen: 2105
Fields:
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT20_TX
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT50_TX
 
Here is a screenshot of the transaction:
As you can see, only EN can be changed or new entry may be added. But DE and PL is not changeable.
 
In TC MASS and FST2, the texts can be changed without any problems. So it must have something to do with FS00/FSP0, not with field status.
Have any of you observed anything like this? Do you know what can be done?

Thanks in advance for any advice and best regards
Rado

entry.title: Tcode me28 user id wise supplier plant restriction.
entry.content:
We have near 20 plants.

Currently in tcode me28 any user can able to see any plant details.

But we need to restrict user id wise supplier plant authorization access.

Can you help how to restrict this is must? because in the present system any body can able to see any plant and do the approval in this tcode.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CKM3N. cost component split for semi finished
entry.content:
hi guys,

we are doing actual costing. 

Say , 1 FERT material consumed 1 HALB material, 1 HALB consumed 1 ROH. at period end CKMLCP was handled. 

CKM3N of HALB shows production consumption the initial goods issue document (with no cost component) and the next line of calculated price difference, which is split by cost component correctly. 

So essentially rollup is not working.

when your consumption of 100 dollars HALB is not split, and the price difference of 50ct is split, that's not too much of actual costing.

S4H 107. 

Actually, same happens with the COGS posting. there is a GI posting for 100 eur, no cost component, 

and then there is a new line of revaluation of the price difference, and that line is split by cost components.

Question. How can I "enforce" the cost component split for HALB on initial goods issue document  (261 consumption to FERT) ?  I feel I am missing a SPRO checkbox somewhere.

thank you.
Laimonas

entry.title: Getting error during reporting missing HU in PI process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We couldn"t be able to report missing HU via RF getting below error where bin having single HU and can be able to report missing HUs where Bin having more than one HU.

Error: Not all quants for product 51431704 were counted; no save possible (/SCWM/UI_PI026).

Regards,

Santhosh

entry.title: PCN874 - Update Record Type
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to update Record Type (H-Any Other Document) for one Israeli Vendor with specific tax code and excepted output should be when we will run the PCN874 report then record type H should reflect in the PCN874.txt file. 

I have updated record type in /ATL/RECTYPE1 table and tried to run report (after posting a vendor invoice) but no expected result.

Can anyone suggest what needs to be updated?

entry.title: Message no.VN03 in MR90
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am getting below error while try to execute output message in MR90. 

checked MRM1 to maintain record but error didnt change. can you please help me to resolve this?

 

Thanks,

Faizan Ahmed

entry.title: MB52 'SQL code: 4' error
entry.content:
Hi  Experts

When I use MB52 for a full query and there is a error ' SQL error "SQL code: 4" occurred while accessing table "NSDM_E_MSPR".'  Can you help me .

entry.title: Hand Over of Purchase Requisition generated from MRP not showing in MyInbox for approuval
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I'm using the handover process,  so when the PR generated from MRP, they  are checked by the planner and then once OK they are  handed over to supply team, those MRP generated PR once handed over they need to go through approuval (PR workflow of approuval via Firoi y Inbox), Im using the standard workflow and not the flixible one

The PR generated manuellay are displayed in the MyInbox, but the MRP PR once handed over, I can't find them in the INBOX, I can see the tab release strategy displayed in the PR once handed over but they dont go to the Inbox for approuver so I have to do ME54N toi approuve them

Any Help regarding this please
